title: Automations to deselect ietms after moving to a new group
excerpt:
After moving items to a new group within a board by automation, items still gets selected in the new group. How to make automation to deselect Items after it is moved to a new group?

posts.author: sujitsonar (Sujit Sonar)
posts.cookedHtml:
After moving items to a new group within a board by automation, items still gets selected in the new group. How to make automation to deselect Items after it is moved to a new group?

The challenge i am facing is, after moving the first set of items by automation, these items still stay selected in the new group and if i select 2nd set of items and change status to trigger automation to move to different group, even the 1st set of items gets moved to the 2nd group because it is default selected unless i manually deselect it before moving the 2nd set.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Selections in your browser are controlled by you. There isn’t a way to force deselect on an automation. You need to just manually manage your selections.
